storyInfo: While running away, Momoka bumps into Hoshiguma, who helps the girl escape her pursuers. On their trail, Mifune broadcasts a 'missing person notice', effectively mobilizing the whole of Mitsukue to look for the duo.

attributes.content: Kami?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Yeah. I think all the funny stuff going on around Mitsukue has been tricks played by these kami-sama. And I'm looking for one of the many out there.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: You don't believe me?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Oni are more familiar into monastery-type stuff.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Besides, I'm finding it hard to guess what sort of kami-sama would be so bored as to hop on a unicycle and curse my house.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Haha, sounds like most other Oni I know.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Why are you looking for this 'kami-sama'? Do you think one of them's cursed you?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma
Moriuchi
attributes.content: The opposite, actually. Did me a solid once.

attributes.name: Moriuchi
attributes.content: But one day, It just vanished.
Could it be the Wanyuudou?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Maybe? Can't say for sure. After all, I can't tell what the unicycling kami-sama looks like.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: So, mind doing me a favor?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: If you see the Wanyuudou, or are even... lucky enough to see Its actual form, help me check if It looks like this.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Moriuchi pulls out a ring of keys from his pocket, with a tiny keychain attached.
A maneki-neko? Isn't that a mascot Higashinese Felines created based on Feline Beast Stewards?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: The kami-sama I met practically looks the same, apart from the size difference.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Hoshiguma-san, since you're no ghost, then I wager you're after this Wanyuudou to figure out what's up with your house, yeah?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Taishou, I never introduced myself to you.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Are you one of the Kinsekikai?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: (Shakes head) Naw. Why would anyone from the Kinsekikai set up a yatai here?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: An informant for the cops, then?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: (Shakes head) Rather throw my life away.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: An information broker.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: (Does not nod or shake head)
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Ha, I mean, what kind of intel guy would admit he's in the business?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: But if you're in the business, then I don't think it's fair for you to ask me for help without offering anything in return.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Hah. What sort of reward would you like, Hoshiguma-san? If it's information, I can tell you all I know.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Don't worry about it. We can come back to that once I figure out what kind of information I'm after.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Anything that would cost you your life if you talked about it? Best to let me know beforehand. Last minute confessions won't get you any help from me.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: No, if you really manage to find me a useful clue or two, nothing's off the table.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Deal?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Deal.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Alright. So, where should I go looking for that Wanyuudou? A shrine?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Don't forget, the city under us isn't called 'Nan'in Anzai Mitsukueooyashiro' for nothing. This is the Southern Court's De-Facto Capital Mitsukue Grand Shrine. You can't possibly want me to go on a whole pilgrimage route?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Of course not. Do you know where's the place locals call Kizuna Jinja, the shrine of bonds?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Heard a bit about that one.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Though, if you know exactly which one to go to, why haven't you gone yourself?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Kamigami are fickle beings. They'll willingly appear before some, but won't grace others, no matter what.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: And you're part of that 'other' group?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Seems so, ever since that kami left me.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Taishou! My scooter's all busted! Help me fix it before the guys chasing me catch up!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: EEK! WHY ARE YOU HERE?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Still think I'm a ghost, huh?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Wait, so, you're not?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: *Sigh*
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Momoka? What's with the panic?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: I'm being chased! I rode my scooter here and shook them off, but it broke down. Could you get it running again?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Who's after you?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: It's... It's Mio-san...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Mio? Then you best be good and follow her home. Overstep your calorie count again?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: No, she wants to... get rid of me!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: My TV suddenly freaked out and started broadcasting scary stuff!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: She was talking to Mifune-san! They said—Death or Oripathy! Tasukete!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Momoka starts to babble incoherently.
Moriuchi has no time to react before Hoshiguma walks over to the scooter.
Death? Oripathy? Momoka-san, did you offend them somehow?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: All I did was to post one message, I wasn't planning anything or scheming with Tessai, nuh-uh!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Scheming with Tessai?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Let's see if this ride's fixable.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Why don't you go after the Wanyuudou first?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Playing dumb, information broker-san?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: This is my second time scaring Momoka-san here. She's in a pinch now, so I should do what I can to even the score.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Momoka-san, I promise you as long as I'm here, nothing will happen to you.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Sankyuu...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: —Someone's coming from Nita Street! Are they after me?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Kinsekikai outfits... seems to be the case.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Taishou! Ghost-san! Save me!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Ghost-san? Me?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Sorry, I still don't know your name...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: That aside, your ride's back in action.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Hop on, and leave the rest to me.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Ghost-san!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Oh, so here you are, Momo-cchi.
attributes.name: Fierce Yakuza

attributes.content: Be a good girl and come on home with us, yeah? Play nice and we won't hurt you.
attributes.name: Fierce Yakuza

attributes.content: Wh-Where's Mio-san? I want to talk to her!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: What'cha trying to do, huh? Negotiate with us?
attributes.name: Fierce Yakuza

attributes.content: For real, just be good and come on back with us. Then we'll forget everything that happened today. Keep running, and I can't say for sure that your pretty face won't have some new scars by the time we're done playing hide-and-seek.
attributes.name: Fierce Yakuza

attributes.content: Better worry about yourselves first.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: And just who d'you think you are?
attributes.name: Fierce Yakuza

attributes.content: Go, Momoka. I'll handle them.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I can't leave you here all by yourself!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Then keep the back seat empty for me.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: *Indecipherable tongue-click* I don't care who you are, or the bluff you're trying to pull, usero!
attributes.name: Fierce Yakuza

attributes.content: Start the engine!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Omae! Don't think you're getting away!
attributes.name: Fierce Yakuza

attributes.content: Momoka revs the engine, and the one-horned Oni jumps onto the scooter's back seat as the yakuza's weapon swings through the air.
Chikushou! Fire! FIRE! Fill that pesky Oni and her ride with holes!
attributes.name: Fierce Yakuza

attributes.content: What do we do?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Just keep riding as fast as you can. Leave everything else to me.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Momoka is unable to take in her words. She was already hyperventilating before, and her fear turns her into a sobbing mess.
But through her tears, she realizes the lack of crossbow bolts flying past her. She hears only the sound of metal crashing into metal behind her, and the dull thump of bodies hitting something.
She does not know what's going on behind, and can't let go of her worries, so she can only cry as she turns her head around—
Bolts, daggers, and desperate punks, all slamming into Ghost-san's shield.
The shield stands only half a person's height, but in the single-horned Oni's hands it is practically a wall behind her scooter.
I'm gonna turn!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Don't worry about me. You'd ridden this fast before?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: OnlywhenfilminganditwasfakeIDON'THAVEACHOICEANYWAYS!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: What did they teach you when you were filming?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: C-Countersteer, then lean in...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Yeah, just do that.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Momoka wails even louder as she imagines failing to pull off a countersteer.
She can already picture a scenario in her head where she pushes too hard, sending Ghost-san and herself flying straight into the yakuza's hands—
AhhhhHHHHWHATEVER!!!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Sparks fly from the vehicle, but it still manages a thrilling turn around the corner.
Now going straight, Momoka bites her lip, and grips the throttle tightly. The tremendous velocity even blows her tears off her face into the breeze.
The clamor of their pursuers gradually fades away.
Where are you going? I'll make sure you get there safe and sound, before I head over to the shrine to help the Taishou out.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Did Moriuchi-san... ask you to do something?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: To chase a kaidan I saw with my own eyes. A unicycle ridden by an invisible being. Told me to look for it at the shrine.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: It appeared next to me in the middle of the night, and I chased it all the way to his yatai, before you came to us.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: In the middle of the night... a k-kaidan...?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Scared? Then let's split up.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: No, I'll go with you. I can't go home anymore, much less the agency...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: There's... nowhere else for me to go.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I can't go with you?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: You can. But keep your voice down, or you'll draw in those guys again. Done with all your screaming now? Does your throat hurt?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Not at all! I've had vocal training, you know! Even when I'm not on stage, I do as I'm taught to prevent damage to my vocal chords!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: That so?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You're... back?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Just doing a bit of work... brought something back here.
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Did Kinbee ask you to send me something again? I won't be able to use it, so go back and leave me to my work.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Hoshiguma's shield. 'Hannya', right?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: You met her?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Even if I didn't, I've heard enough of her from you over the past few years.
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Take that strange mask off your face.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Why do you care what I wear?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Didn't Kinbee tell you to put that on when you went over to his place?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: I said you were too honest with your emotions, and lack the composure of a leader. All you did was throwing tantrums at home and scratching the shoji screen doors with your worthless bokutou.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: He tells you to hide your emotions, and you put this on like a good boy? Do you even know what could be hiding inside that mask?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: I don't care if it's rigged with bombs and blows up my face one day, it's none of your business.
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Omae!
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Leave. I want you and your lousy mask out of my sight.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Leave? Me? What about my mother?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: What about her?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Today is the day she died, Chairman Tessai!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Today?!
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: You forgot everything. All you think about is your reopened forge.
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: That's no excuse for you to hang around with that viper Kinbee.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Viper? And how did Kaa-san die again? What did he do when she died? What did you do? If he's a viper, what does that make you?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Shut up—
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: What are Kaa-san and I to your Kinsekikai?!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Forget it, there's nothing for us to discuss.
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: I'm going in to pay my respects to her. Don't get in my way.
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: What—
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: What is it?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Mifune-san... showing up on TV after all these years?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: That was a fun pachinko sesh! Tomorrow, I gotta run over to the shrine, so today... up the stairs to my room, and it's time to catch some Zs!
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: I lost seven thousand five hundred mon today. That means, for the rest of the month I still have...
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Huh. Barely enough to get by.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Alright. Well, I should've asked Old Man Tessai for my pay for looking after the parlor.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: As long as I don't think about how much I've lost, pachinko's always a fun time.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Face wash done, TV's on, terminal charging...
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Huh?
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: News jacking? What's going on?
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Wait, why's he—
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Kichisei jumps up from her futon and stares at the screen in shock.
Kinbee?!
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Logs, cache, hardware traces...
All traces clean.
From terminal placements to signal hijacking and the aftermath... the whole process took about... two hours?
Everything that had to be verified's done. The broadcast, linking to live monitors, and live subtitles. All okay.
There were minor glitches from signal fluctuations, but they weren't anything unmanageable. A little workaround here and there and it should be all good to go next time. Kanpeki!
I'm so tired. I wanna sleep.
Locking in for two hours straight is my limit. I'm so sleepy.
No, I can't sleep here. Even a Kinseki Channel employee taking a nap in here would be pretty suspicious.
I have to go back to that cramped and lousy office—
Huh? An interim broadcast?
Uh oh! I gotta hide!
Yes, I'm here. Let me test the machine...
attributes.name: Tired Staff

attributes.content: What? No, I'm the only one in here.
attributes.name: Tired Staff

attributes.content: Right, yes.
attributes.name: Tired Staff

attributes.content: All's set in place. The broadcast can start at any time.
attributes.name: Tired Staff

attributes.content: Mio-san? What a rare sight.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: I recommend the chikuwa, but the burdenbeast tendons and fowlbeast eggs are must-tries too. If you fancy something lighter, may I suggest our daikon or konbu knots—
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Don't play dumb, Moriuchi. Where's Momoka and the Ao-Oni?
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: How would I know?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Just give me a number. The Kinsekikai can afford it.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: I only sell oden here. How could I possibly know where my customers go after filling their bellies?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: An appropriate pushback is understandable, but an excessive defiance means refusal to cooperate.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: No, no, I would never.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: I don't get it, s'all. She's just a showgirl at your mercy, without any kin in the city. Where could she possibly run off to? What harm could she do to your Kinsekikai?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Are you trying to pull information out of me?
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: I wouldn't dare.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Mio-san, I'm sure you've known her for a long time, even longer than I've known her.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: She got to know me because my oden's yummy, and I know all about the kaidan in the city. I only offered a few comforting words and to be honest, we're not that close at all.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: But I can tell she's just a lost little lass being pushed around with no bad intentions. I'm sure you've spent way more time with her, so what say you?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: I see you're insisting on your silence.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: C'mon, let's not put it that way.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: How about, helping me leave a good review for this spot? Something about this place being a rare gem, and a great bang for your buck.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Why not have some oden to appease your hunger and mood?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Chikuwa, tendon, egg, daikon, and konbu knot. One of each.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Mio-san, you...?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: So you had no intention of giving me a free meal? I see how it is. Fine for Momoka, but not for me.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: What? No! I just thought you'd never allow me the honor of serving you my humble cooking.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Here you go.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Itadakimasu.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: She claps her hands and dips her head before her meal, then takes the chikuwa from the paper cup for a nibble.
It's hot—
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: The noise echoing down Nita Street suddenly dips in volume.
Pedestrians fall silent at the exact same moment, like fowlbeasts on a single tree suddenly stopping their chirping.
But the silence only lasts a few seconds before a uniform voice booms from every television screen on the street.
Good evening, citizens of Mitsukue.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I'm terribly sorry for taking up your time. I, Kouhei Mifune, have news to break to you all.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: When's the last time your boss showed his face on a program?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: More than a decade ago.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: ...The singer and actress Momoka Hanyuu, is currently missing.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I repeat, the whereabouts of popular singer and actress Momoka Hanyuu, who has a long-term contract with our company, are currently unknown.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: According to reliable sources, Momoka-san's disappearance is closely linked to the kaidan tales circulating in the city.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: We are still verifying how they are related to the situation, but we are certain of one thing, at the core of this strange incident is...
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: The 'Ao-Oni of Kinsekikai', the 'Single-horned Oni', among many more nicknames.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: A female Oni with one horn, long green hair, of tall and sturdy build. Said to carry a large triangular shield.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: She vanished two decades ago, spawning the myth that she was haunting the city as a vengeful spirit late at night, killing anyone who'd been connected with her.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Many attendees report seeing this individual at Momoka-san's concert.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: As for whether she is truly a living being, a pretender, or a genuine ghost—we are as yet uncertain.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: As the man responsible for the company Momoka-san is contracted to, I make a sincere appeal for the general public to contact us with any clues. You will be rewarded handsomely.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I'm sure Momoka-san also harbors hope that you will help her out of her plight...
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Just... for that? To find Momoka and the Ao-Oni?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: What did they even do to provoke Mifune?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: None of your business.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: I don't get it, Mio-san. Is this lass really worth your boss getting so worked up?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: They've got Mifune casting such a wide net over the city, woven of every pair of eyes glued to the TV—
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Moriuchi sees a flash of something.
A tantou.
In the same instant he lacked any time to respond, the short blade stabs into the wooden oden table.
If you choose to be silent, then it's best you stay silent. Not even a word. Remember this well.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: It would be very sad to see your oden disappear from this city.
attributes.name: Mio
